pageTitle.value: Deepsea Under The Pole by Rolex (Extended) - Video

pageCaption.value: Deepsea Under The Pole by Rolex is a pioneering expedition and innovative human adventure that combines ski trekking and scuba diving in one of the toughest climates on the planet. Throughout the journey, the eight expedition members collected audio recordings, photographs and video material of the hidden side of the polar ice cap, in addition to successfully conducting two scientific experiments related to snow measurements and human body reactions.

text.value: Deepsea Under The Pole by Rolex is a pioneering expedition and innovative human adventure that combines ski trekking and scuba diving in one of the toughest climates on the planet. Throughout the journey, the eight expedition members collected audio recordings, photographs and video material of the hidden side of the polar ice cap, in addition to successfully conducting two scientific experiments related to snow measurements and human body reactions.

pageTitle.value: The 10-year anniversary of the Rolex Deepsea Challenge - Video

pageCaption.value: Ten years ago, on 26 March 2012, Rolex Testimonee James Cameron made history as the first person to dive solo to the deepest part of the Earth, the Pacific Ocean’s Mariana Trench, at 10,908 metres (35,787 feet).

WaPageTitle.value: Rolex Deepsea Challenge - A decade on with James Cameron - Video

metadescription.value: On the 10-year anniversary of his expedition, Rolex Testimonee James Cameron reflects on his journey to the deep sea. Watch the video on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Rolex Deepsea Challenge - A decade on with James Cameron - Video

pageTitle.value: Rewilding Chile and Rewilding Argentina - Episode 2

pageCaption.value: Since land across the Patagonian Steppe was converted into a national park, Rewilding Chile has been working to reinstate the native flora and fauna to the area. The team started by removing hundreds of kilometres of fencing, which broke up the land into sections and prevented animals from moving freely. Now, several species are beginning to thrive, like the endangered Patagonian huemul deer, which are helping to build a healthy forest ecosystem for the future.

WaPageTitle.value: Tompkins Conservation: Rewilding Chile and Rewilding Argentina - Episode 2

metadescription.value: By removing over 800 km of fencing, Rewilding Chile has reestablished interactions been species in the Patagonia Steppe. Watch the video on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Tompkins Conservation: Rewilding Chile and Rewilding Argentina - Episode 2

pageTitle.value: Marine life in the Bahamas – Environment Video

pageCaption.value: Through a combination of policy, outreach and educational activities, the Bahamas Reef Environment Educational Foundation (BREEF), in partnership with Rolex, works to inspire communities to protect the marine environment of the beautiful low-lying islands. Watch the video on rolex.org.

WaPageTitle.value: Protecting marine life in the Bahamas - Perpetual Planet - Video

metadescription.value: Rolex supports the Bahamas Reef Environment Educational Foundation in their fight to protect the local marine ecosystem. Watch the video on rolex.org.
